title: November 26
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 26''' is the 330th day of the year (331st in leap years). There are 35 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Michael Gregory]] is born.
*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[Daniel Davis]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Sean James]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 76|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 76]] published.
*[[1995]] - [[Mardji]] dies.
*[[1996]] – "[[Pattern and Web]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1997]] – [[The Last Command 1|''The Last Command'' 1]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Empire 13|''Star Wars: Empire 13: What Sin Loyalty?'']] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Dave Cockrum]] dies.
*[[2008]] – [[Legacy (2006) 30|''Legacy'' (2006) 30]] published.
*2008 – ''[[Rogue Leaders: The Story of LucasArts]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Scoundrels]]'' paperback published.
*2013 – ''[[Star Wars: A Very Vader Valentine's Day]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – "[[The Wynkahthu Job]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars: Age of Resistance — Heroes]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Modern Era Epic Collection: Shadows and Secrets]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Boba Fett — Black, White & Red 3|''Boba Fett — Black, White & Red'' 3]] published.
<noinclude>
